case_title: MSW CAPITAL, LLC VS. MITCHELL BURCH ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURCH, MITCHELL $6,634.12 PRINCIPAL, $555.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,189.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BURCH, MITCHELL DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-06-2018
DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100048580) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL, LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $362.60 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100048580) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BURCH, MITCHELL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037758), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL, LLC SERVED FEB-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURCH, MITCHELL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS ON STIPULATED JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040937) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BURCH, MITCHELL
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040937) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT BURCH, MITCHELL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-29-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
